novelty_flags.label: upgrade_review
novelty_flags.one_line: PN5 cluster lock is only partially satisfied: parent v1 is a PartialID/support-function proposal, while the upgrade locked block labels the anchor as ExactID even though the math still optimizes support functions over set-identified rotation sets; delta_summary generalization is substantive but needs cluster relock.

soundness_flags.label: Formal setup / Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The displayed finite program for eta_w^*(P) constrains only the off-diagonal residual norm; m_eta(Q;P)=0 also requires the pure diagonal coordinates of K^Q to equal an admissible separated kappa, so diagonal residual constraints are missing.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The two-shock formula defines eta_w^*(P) only from the off-diagonal residual after optimizing over kappa, but contact also requires feasible pure diagonal cumulants satisfying K_delta4(j); the formula can declare contact when diagonal admissibility fails.

soundness_flags.label: Locked parameters
soundness_flags.one_line: The locked block says anchor_cluster = ExactID, but the proposal's target is a support-function equality/frontier over LP and SVAR feasible sets, matching the parent PartialID cluster and its bounding-functional convention.

upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The eta-bounded co-kurtosis leakage generalization and eta=0 parent corner are present, but the upgrade is not cleanly locked to the parent PartialID/support-function cluster and the eta_w^*(P) program omits diagonal contact constraints.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add pure-diagonal contact constraints K^Q_{aaaa}=kappa_a with kappa in K_delta4(j) to the finite program and to the two-shock closed-form formula, or explicitly define eta_w^*(P) as infinite when no admissible diagonal kappa exists at the LP support face.

Relock the anchor as the parent PartialID/support-function cluster: use observable distribution P, parameter theta_w or psi_j, identifying restrictions, and bounding functional eta_w^*(P) / support gap, rather than calling the proposal ExactID.

Add a boundary corollary separating off-diagonal leakage failure from diagonal-separation failure; this would make the Gaussian/equal-kurtosis sanity case and the eta=0 parent reduction auditable in one line.

recommended_next_step: Revise the locked cluster and repair the eta_w^*(P) contact program by including diagonal cumulant admissibility before sending the proposal back for novelty review.
